message:
fix(connectors): remove non-production default URLs from DocuSign and Plaid [P0]

DocuSign: rename DEFAULT_BASE_URL to DEMO_BASE_URL, require explicit
base_url in configure() with clear error message explaining demo vs
production (na1/na2/eu/au) URL selection. DocuSignClient::new() now
takes &str instead of Option<&str>. 873 tests pass.

Plaid: require explicit environment selection (sandbox/development/
production) in configure() — no longer defaults to sandbox. Rename
DEFAULT_BASE_URL to SANDBOX_BASE_URL. 224 lib tests pass; 18
pre-existing integration failures (OperationNotGranted) are unrelated.

Close beads: m4ujo, 50oeb, qgu6t (P0 critical)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
